rationale: The cited paper is used in the empirical analysis, not merely listed as general background. In the post hoc interaction-probing section, the authors explicitly state they rely on Spiller et al. (2013) to examine conditional interaction effects and ranges where effects hold. This methodological use directly informs how key interaction results are interpreted.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Spiller et al. (2013)'s moderated-regression probing guidance to interpret significant interaction terms in post hoc tests. The cited work is used as the analytic framework for conditional/simple-effects interpretation of interactions.
